political.s: FEC: $316K in executive political donations; partisan lean split across 12 executive donors.

charity.s: $10M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.23% of revenue) via International Dairy Queen Foundation.

environment.s: Via parent company Berkshire Hathaway: air pollution violation: $640.5M in federal penalties (Violation Tracker).

privacy.s: Terms-of-service privacy grade D (poor) via ToS;DR (tosdr.org), CC BY-SA 3.0 — transformed to TruNorth's scale.

sampleRecords.final_narrative: On April 1, 2023, at 4:04 PM, two employees were talking as one employee stowed his belongings in the prep room. One employee began showing the injured employee his gun when it fired. The injured employee was shot in the arm and required hospitalization and surgery.

sampleRecords.part_of_body: Abdomen, except internal location of diseases or disorders
sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to tripping over an object
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee tripped over two boxes while walking out of a walk-in refrigerator. She suffered an ankle injury and a fracture in the abdominal region and was hospitalized.
